{"id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.3","title":"Python/Rust: LR-FHSS simulation model","description":"Model LR-FHSS collision behavior in simulator.

## Changes
1. Add LR-FHSS mode to simulated radio
2. Model fragment-level collisions (not packet-level)
3. Simulate hopping sequence and partial packet recovery
4. Compare collision rates: standard LoRa vs LR-FHSS

## Collision model
- Standard LoRa: any overlap = both packets lost
- LR-FHSS: overlap corrupts fragments, FEC may recover

## Metrics to capture
- Packet delivery rate at various densities
- Effective throughput with 2x airtime penalty
- Crossover point where LR-FHSS wins","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:14.922254Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:14.922254Z","labels":["simulator","python","rust","hardware","phy","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:15.082412Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zd2d.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:15.201273Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
